content: Why do we tip even when we know we ll never see the server again? New research suggests it s not just about rewarding good service, but about social pressure. Some people tip out of genuine appreciation, while others simply follow the norm. But here s the twist  those who truly value great service tend to tip more than average, and everyone else adjusts upward to match them.
